title: 1.1: Tests that processing multiple mail accounts continues when one account fails
1.2: Tests that processing messages continues when one message raises an exception
1.3: Tests that correspondent is created and assigned when mail rule is configured
1.4: Tests that database errors during correspondent creation are handled gracefully
2.1: Places tests for mail error handling in the paperless_mail tests directory
3.1: All tests use Django TestCase as the base class
3.2: All tests follow the naming pattern test_<description>
3.3: All tests are placed in test classes that mock external dependencies
